name: Claim denied after work injury - what now in Saint George?
description: Appeal within 20 days to Labor Commission with evidence.[3]

mainEntity.name: Claim denied after work injury - what now in Saint George?

acceptedAnswer.text: Appeal within 20 days to Labor Commission with evidence.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description: Appeal to Utah Labor Commission within 20 days of denial notice.[3] Request administrative hearing with new evidence. Key factors: (1) Strict 20-day appeal deadline; (2) Submit medical proof of work link; (3) Idiopathic falls need aggravation evidence; (4) Higher review possible. Hire attorney experienced in appeals; many denials overturned with proper docs. Act fast to preserve rights.
